title: Procedură pentru prelevare de probe în cazul observării unei mortalități masive în stupină în perioadă de cules intens de nectar
description: A procedural guide for collecting biological and plant samples in the event of massive bee mortality during intense nectar foraging. It outlines methods for sampling dead bees, sunflower heads, and rapeseed plants, as well as sample labeling, storage, and shipment procedures compliant with veterinary sanitary regulations.
